TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog6_kalaeh a _oemaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' kita' ka takem hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka takəm hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' kita' ka takem hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka takəm hiz~ðaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗看著青蛙.
This dog was looking at that frog.

S.FORM: korkoring ka kitkita' ila ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ ka kitkitaʔ ila ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: korkoring ka kitkita' ila ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ ka kitkitaʔ ila ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩一直看著狗.
The child was looking intently at the dog.

S.FORM: kita' koSa kano' hiza k a kano' ka kita' ka takem.
S.PHON: kitaʔ koʃa kanoʔ hiz~ða k a kanoʔ ka kitaʔ ka takəm.
S.FORM: kita' koSa kano' hiza k a kano' ka kita' ka takem.
S.PHON: kitaʔ koʃa kanoʔ hiz~ða k a kanoʔ ka kitaʔ ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看著青蛙.
The child was looking at the frog.

S.FORM: takem kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.FORM: takem kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙跑了出來.
The frog came out.

S.FORM: hini' korkoring ma'rem.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ maʔrəm.
S.FORM: hini' korkoring ma'rem.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ maʔrəm.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去睡覺.
The child went to sleep.

S.FORM: kano' kaybaeen nia hini' nia kaybaeen.
S.PHON: kanoʔ kajβæən nia hiniʔ nia kajβæən.
S.FORM: kano' kaybaeen nia hini' nia kaybaeen.
S.PHON: kanoʔ kajβæən nia hiniʔ nia kajβæən.
S.TRANSL: 他的衣服.
These were his clothes.

S.FORM: haehoeway hini' ma hini' haehoeway.
S.PHON: hæhœwaj hiniʔ ma hiniʔ hæhœwaj.
S.FORM: haehoeway hini' ma hini' haehoeway.
S.PHON: hæhœwaj hiniʔ ma hiniʔ hæhœwaj.
S.TRANSL: 也有他的鞋子.
These were his shoes too.

S.FORM: nia haehoeway ilahini min'itol ila ka.
S.PHON: nia hæhœwaj ilahini minʔitol ila ka.
S.FORM: nia haehoeway ilahini min'itol ila ka.
S.PHON: nia hæhœwaj ilahini minʔitol ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 他的鞋子在這裡 ...
His shoes were here ...

S.FORM: korkoring kita' naehaen ila hini' ray krwaSekan noka takem ro takem 'oka' ila i kita'i.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kitaʔ næhæn ila hiniʔ raj krwaʃəkan noka takəm ro takəm ʔokaʔ ila i kitaʔi.
S.FORM: korkoring kita' naehaen ila hini' ray krwaSekan noka takem ro takem 'oka' ila i kita'i.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kitaʔ næhæn ila hiniʔ raj krwaʃəkan noka takəm ro takəm ʔokaʔ ila i kitaʔi.
S.TRANSL: 當他起來後,他找不到青蛙.
When he woke up, he couldn't find the frog in the container.

S.FORM: hini' kaybaeen ma' ray ra ray rai' kabih 'askan ma pin pababoees.
S.PHON: hiniʔ kajβæən maʔ raj ra raj raiʔ kaβih ʔas~θkan ma pin paβaβœəs~θ.
S.FORM: hini' kaybaeen ma' ray ra ray rai' kabih 'askan ma pin pababoees.
S.PHON: hiniʔ kajβæən maʔ raj ra raj raiʔ kaβih ʔas~θkan ma pin paβaβœəs~θ.
S.TRANSL: 衣服散佈在地上.
The clothes were scattered all over the floor.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' korkoring mari' ka kano' hiza' XXXX nisia sisilin babaw.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ mariʔ ka kanoʔ hiz~ðaʔ **** nis~θia s~θis~θilin βaβaw.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' korkoring mari' ka kano' hiza' XXXX nisia sisilin babaw.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ mariʔ ka kanoʔ hiz~ðaʔ **** nis~θia s~θis~θilin βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿起什麼,舉起來.
The child took his what-is-it and lifted it up.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' haysia kita' ma moiti' ila o ray noka a takem ray krwaSekan kita' 'oka' ila ka takem.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ hajs~θia kitaʔ ma moitiʔ ila o raj noka a takəm raj krwaʃəkan kitaʔ ʔokaʔ ila ka takəm.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' haysia kita' ma moiti' ila o ray noka a takem ray krwaSekan kita' 'oka' ila ka takem.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ hajs~θia kitaʔ ma moitiʔ ila o raj noka a takəm raj krwaʃəkan kitaʔ ʔokaʔ ila ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 狗還在看,把頭塞到養青蛙的瓶子裡,可是沒看到青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: The dog was still watching and stuck (its head) into the container where the frog had been, but it saw that the frog was not there.

S.TRANSL: The dog was still watching and stuck into the container where the frog had been, but it saw that the frog was not there.

S.FORM: raiw ila.
S.PHON: raiw ila.
S.FORM: raiw ila.
S.PHON: raiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 不見了.
was gone.

S.FORM: hini' haysia ila ma pataboe' ray ka'alingo'an hiza' ka kapsaraloman a.
S.PHON: hiniʔ hajs~θia ila ma pataβœʔ raj kaʔaliŋoʔan hiz~ðaʔ ka kaps~θaraloman a.
S.FORM: hini' haysia ila ma pataboe' ray ka'alingo'an hiza' ka kapsaraloman a.
S.PHON: hiniʔ hajs~θia ila ma pataβœʔ raj kaʔaliŋoʔan hiz~ðaʔ ka kaps~θaraloman a.
S.TRANSL: 他的頭還是卡在裝水的地方.
Its head was still stuck inside the bottle.

S.FORM: korkoring hini' haewaeh ka hinoehas.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hiniʔ hæwæh ka hinœhas~θ.
S.FORM: korkoring hini' haewaeh ka hinoehas.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hiniʔ hæwæh ka hinœhas~θ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩打開窗戶.
The child opened the window.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe ka 'oe'oe ka mae'iyaeh raamen.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ka ʔœʔœ ka mæʔijæh raamən.
S.FORM: 'oe'oe ka 'oe'oe ka mae'iyaeh raamen.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ka ʔœʔœ ka mæʔijæh raamən.
S.TRANSL: 他叫,青蛙會知道.

TRANSL.notes: And called out (the window). (The frog) will know by his calling.

S.TRANSL: And called out . will know by his calling.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' haysia 'ima pataboe' ray ka'askanan ka ralom.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ hajs~θia ʔima pataβœʔ raj kaʔas~θkanan ka ralom.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' haysia 'ima pataboe' ray ka'askanan ka ralom.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhœʔ hajs~θia ʔima pataβœʔ raj kaʔas~θkanan ka ralom.
S.TRANSL: 狗的頭還是卡在放水的地方.
The dog's head was still stuck inside the container.

S.FORM: korkoring kas kita' yo 'oka' ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kas~θ kitaʔ jo ʔokaʔ ka mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: korkoring kas kita' yo 'oka' ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kas~θ kitaʔ jo ʔokaʔ ka mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: 小孩沒有看到人.
The boy saw that there was nobody.

S.FORM: 'insa'an nisia hiza' mlakay ila ka binbinisitan hiza' ka kap raloman.
S.PHON: ʔins~θaʔan nis~θia hiz~ðaʔ mlakaj ila ka βinβinis~θitan hiz~ðaʔ ka kap raloman.
S.FORM: 'insa'an nisia hiza' mlakay ila ka binbinisitan hiza' ka kap raloman.
S.PHON: ʔins~θaʔan nis~θia hiz~ðaʔ mlakaj ila ka βinβinis~θitan hiz~ðaʔ ka kap raloman.
S.TRANSL: 被用來放水的瓶子破了
The bottle that was used to contain water broke.

S.FORM: hiza' ka 'aehoe' kayzaeh ila nisia mari'in 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ka ʔæhœʔ kajz~ðæh ila nis~θia mariʔin ʔæwpœʔœn ila.
S.FORM: hiza' ka 'aehoe' kayzaeh ila nisia mari'in 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ka ʔæhœʔ kajz~ðæh ila nis~θia mariʔin ʔæwpœʔœn ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗沒事,小孩拿起狗帶著他.
The dog was all right; the boy took him up and carried him.

S.FORM: korkoring hiza' 'oe'oe 'aehoe' ma hiza' hinghae' 'oyae' ma tobong.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hiz~ðaʔ ʔœʔœ ʔæhœʔ ma hiz~ðaʔ hiŋhæʔ ʔojæʔ ma toβoŋ.
S.FORM: korkoring hiza' 'oe'oe 'aehoe' ma hiza' hinghae' 'oyae' ma tobong.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hiz~ðaʔ ʔœʔœ ʔæhœʔ ma hiz~ðaʔ hiŋhæʔ ʔojæʔ ma toβoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩叫,狗也吠叫.
The child called out; the dog also barked along.

S.FORM: tobong hiza' 'am mwai' a hini' ray kaehoey hayza ka boya' mwai'.
S.PHON: toβoŋ hiz~ðaʔ ʔam mwaiʔ a hiniʔ raj kæhœj hajz~ða ka βojaʔ mwaiʔ.
S.FORM: tobong hiza' 'am mwai' a hini' ray kaehoey hayza ka boya' mwai'.
S.PHON: toβoŋ hiz~ðaʔ ʔam mwaiʔ a hiniʔ raj kæhœj hajz~ða ka βojaʔ mwaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗在叫的時候,有蜂從樹那邊來.
As the dog was barking, there were bees coming from the tree.

S.FORM: hayap ila hini' isahiza hoema hayapen noka boya' ila hiza' hilasia 'oe'oe komoSa hiza' ka boya' XXXX isahini 'aehoe' kita' ka boya' twa'is tobong ka boya'.
S.PHON: hajap ila hiniʔ is~θahiz~ða hœma hajapən noka βojaʔ ila hiz~ðaʔ hilas~θia ʔœʔœ komoʃa hiz~ðaʔ ka βojaʔ **** is~θahini ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ twaʔis~θ toβoŋ ka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: hayap ila hini' isahiza hoema hayapen noka boya' ila hiza' hilasia 'oe'oe komoSa hiza' ka boya' XXXX isahini 'aehoe' kita' ka boya' twa'is tobong ka boya'.
S.PHON: hajap ila hiniʔ is~θahiz~ða hœma hajapən noka βojaʔ ila hiz~ðaʔ hilas~θia ʔœʔœ komoʃa hiz~ðaʔ ka βojaʔ **** is~θahini ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka βojaʔ twaʔis~θ toβoŋ ka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 當他們一直叫時,蜂在飛,狗繼續對蜂吠叫當他看到他們過來時.

TRANSL.notes: The bees were hovering above while they kept on calling and the dog continued barking at the bees when it saw them (coming).

S.TRANSL: The bees were hovering above while they kept on calling and the dog continued barking at the bees when it saw them .

S.FORM: a hiza' korkoring raam komoSa boya' a 'aseng ka mae'iyaeh sia masroko'.
S.PHON: a hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ raam komoʃa βojaʔ a ʔas~θəŋ ka mæʔijæh s~θia mas~θrokoʔ.
S.FORM: a hiza' korkoring raam komoSa boya' a 'aseng ka mae'iyaeh sia masroko'.
S.PHON: a hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ raam komoʃa βojaʔ a ʔas~θəŋ ka mæʔijæh s~θia mas~θrokoʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩知道蜂會叮人,(所以)他就彎下.

S.TRANSL: 小孩知道蜂會叮人, 他就彎下.
The child knew the bees sting, and he bent down.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' rima' tete ka hini' ka kahoey ray tinonon noka boya' hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ tətə ka hiniʔ ka kahœj raj tinonon noka βojaʔ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' rima' tete ka hini' ka kahoey ray tinonon noka boya' hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ tətə ka hiniʔ ka kahœj raj tinonon noka βojaʔ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗搖有蜂窩的樹.
The dog shook the tree with the beehive.

S.FORM: boya' te'te'en mwai' ka kas'oehaz ka ka'ina'an.
S.PHON: βojaʔ təʔtəʔən mwaiʔ ka kas~θʔœhaz~ð ka kaʔinaʔan.
S.FORM: boya' te'te'en mwai' ka kas'oehaz ka ka'ina'an.
S.PHON: βojaʔ təʔtəʔən mwaiʔ ka kas~θʔœhaz~ð ka kaʔinaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 搖了後,蜂跑出來了.

TRANSL.notes: (After the dog) shook (the tree), the bees came out.

S.TRANSL: shook , the bees came out.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehae' ka korkoring ma mamtikot ka 'aseng hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhæʔ ka korkoriŋ ma mamtikot ka ʔas~θəŋ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehae' ka korkoring ma mamtikot ka 'aseng hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæhæʔ ka korkoriŋ ma mamtikot ka ʔas~θəŋ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩害怕蜂叮他
The child was afraid that the bees might bit him.

S.FORM: hihimi'an hini'.
S.PHON: hihimiʔan hiniʔ.
S.FORM: hihimi'an hini'.
S.PHON: hihimiʔan hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他很安靜.
He kept quiet.

S.FORM: ka 'aewhaes kas'oehaz em ma kita' 'ima komoSa kano'.
S.PHON: ka ʔæwhæs~θ kas~θʔœhaz~ð əm ma kitaʔ ʔima komoʃa kanoʔ.
S.FORM: ka 'aewhaes kas'oehaz em ma kita' 'ima komoSa kano'.
S.PHON: ka ʔæwhæs~θ kas~θʔœhaz~ð əm ma kitaʔ ʔima komoʃa kanoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠跑出來,看到什麼.
A mouse came out and saw what happened.

S.FORM: e kita' ka korkoring XXXX towa'isin te'te'en hini' ka boya' sahae' ila.
S.PHON: ə kitaʔ ka korkoriŋ **** towaʔis~θin təʔtəʔən hiniʔ ka βojaʔ s~θahæʔ ila.
S.FORM: e kita' ka korkoring XXXX towa'isin te'te'en hini' ka boya' sahae' ila.
S.PHON: ə kitaʔ ka korkoriŋ **** towaʔis~θin təʔtəʔən hiniʔ ka βojaʔ s~θahæʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 繼續搖樹,蜂窩掉了下來.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog continued to) shake (the tree), and the beehive fell down.

S.TRANSL: shake , and the beehive fell down.

S.FORM: kaina'an hini' kas'oehaz saboeh.
S.PHON: kainaʔan hiniʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: kaina'an hini' kas'oehaz saboeh.
S.PHON: kainaʔan hiniʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 蜂全出來了.
The bees all came out.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aewhaes ma kas'oehaz hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæwhæs~θ ma kas~θʔœhaz~ð hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'aewhaes ma kas'oehaz hiza'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔæwhæs~θ ma kas~θʔœhaz~ð hiz~ðaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠也出來了.
The mouse also got out.

S.FORM: 'iya paraiw ila hao hini' ka.
S.PHON: ʔija paraiw ila hao hiniʔ ka.
S.FORM: 'iya paraiw ila hao hini' ka.
S.PHON: ʔija paraiw ila hao hiniʔ ka.
S.TRANSL: 想要趕走 ...
It wanted to shoo away the...

S.FORM: korkoring rima' hosail ila hini' ray kaehoey ray roro' 'am rima' ila hao ray roro' o 'izo'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ hos~θail ila hiniʔ raj kæhœj raj roroʔ ʔam rimaʔ ila hao raj roroʔ o ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: korkoring rima' hosail ila hini' ray kaehoey ray roro' 'am rima' ila hao ray roro' o 'izo'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ hos~θail ila hiniʔ raj kæhœj raj roroʔ ʔam rimaʔ ila hao raj roroʔ o ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去躲在樹洞裡.
The child went to hide up the hole in the tree.

S.FORM: rima' ila hao ray kaehoey ray roro.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila hao raj kæhœj raj roro.
S.FORM: rima' ila hao ray kaehoey ray roro.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila hao raj kæhœj raj roro.
S.TRANSL: 他走向樹洞.
He went toward the hole in the tree.

S.FORM: kita' ka 'oewi' homses hini' korkoring sahae' ila.
S.PHON: kitaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ homs~θəs~θ hiniʔ korkoriŋ s~θahæʔ ila.
S.FORM: kita' ka 'oewi' homses hini' korkoring sahae' ila.
S.PHON: kitaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ homs~θəs~θ hiniʔ korkoriŋ s~θahæʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看到貓頭鷹,掉下去了.
The child, seeing the owl, fell down.

S.FORM: hiza' kas'oehaz kitaen ka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð kitæn ka ʔœwiʔ.
S.FORM: hiza' kas'oehaz kitaen ka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð kitæn ka ʔœwiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來了.
The owl came out.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' sowawon noka boya' mamraiw ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ s~θowawon noka βojaʔ mamraiw ila.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' sowawon noka boya' mamraiw ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ s~θowawon noka βojaʔ mamraiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 蜂追狗,然後離開了.
The bees chased the dog and it ran away.

S.FORM: 'ima asengen ila noka boya' isaa raiw ila.
S.PHON: ʔima as~θəŋən ila noka βojaʔ is~θaa raiw ila.
S.FORM: 'ima asengen ila noka boya' isaa raiw ila.
S.PHON: ʔima as~θəŋən ila noka βojaʔ is~θaa raiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 蜂叮狗,然後離開了.
The bees were stinging the dog, and it ran away.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'oewi' hiza' hayap.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔœwiʔ hiz~ðaʔ hajap.
S.FORM: hini' ka 'oewi' hiza' hayap.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ka ʔœwiʔ hiz~ðaʔ hajap.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹飛.
The owl flew .

S.FORM: korkoring yo hini' homses ila.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ jo hiniʔ homs~θəs~θ ila.
S.FORM: korkoring yo hini' homses ila.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ jo hiniʔ homs~θəs~θ ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了.
The child got surprised.

S.FORM: 'ima komoSa kano' hini' mwai' tai'itol ray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila.
S.PHON: ʔima komoʃa kanoʔ hiniʔ mwaiʔ taiʔitol raj βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila.
S.FORM: 'ima komoSa kano' hini' mwai' tai'itol ray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila.
S.PHON: ʔima komoʃa kanoʔ hiniʔ mwaiʔ taiʔitol raj βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila.
S.TRANSL: 他來到石頭上,在那裡叫.
He got on top of the rock and called there.

S.FORM: 'ima 'oe'oe a ka kano' ka 'aehoe' a kano' mwai' hiza' 'okik raam mwai ka wae'ae' ila hiza'.
S.PHON: ʔima ʔœʔœ a ka kanoʔ ka ʔæhœʔ a kanoʔ mwaiʔ hiz~ðaʔ ʔokik raam mwai ka wæʔæʔ ila hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: 'ima 'oe'oe a ka kano' ka 'aehoe' a kano' mwai' hiza' 'okik raam mwai ka wae'ae' ila hiza'.
S.PHON: ʔima ʔœʔœ a ka kanoʔ ka ʔæhœʔ a kanoʔ mwaiʔ hiz~ðaʔ ʔokik raam mwai ka wæʔæʔ ila hiz~ðaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道鹿來了
He did not know the deer was coming.

S.FORM: isahiza rima' papama' ray wae'ae' babaw.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða rimaʔ papamaʔ raj wæʔæʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: isahiza rima' papama' ray wae'ae' babaw.
S.PHON: is~θahiz~ða rimaʔ papamaʔ raj wæʔæʔ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩騎在鹿上.
The child rode on top of the deer.

S.FORM: a hiza' papama' ray wae'ae' babaw.
S.PHON: a hiz~ðaʔ papamaʔ raj wæʔæʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: a hiza' papama' ray wae'ae' babaw.
S.PHON: a hiz~ðaʔ papamaʔ raj wæʔæʔ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 他騎在鹿上.
He rode on top of the deer.

S.FORM: a ma'onhael a ki 'aehoe' lasia raiw ila.
S.PHON: a maʔonhæl a ki ʔæhœʔ las~θia raiw ila.
S.FORM: a ma'onhael a ki 'aehoe' lasia raiw ila.
S.PHON: a maʔonhæl a ki ʔæhœʔ las~θia raiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 鹿和狗一起離開了.
Together with the dog, the deer left.

S.FORM: hini' 'ima sia 'ae'aeaew ila longa'nga' rima' ray tangob.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔima s~θia ʔæʔææw ila loŋaʔŋaʔ rimaʔ raj taŋoβ.
S.FORM: hini' 'ima sia 'ae'aeaew ila longa'nga' rima' ray tangob.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔima s~θia ʔæʔææw ila loŋaʔŋaʔ rimaʔ raj taŋoβ.
S.TRANSL: 他突然亂跑到懸崖邊.
Then it suddenly ran away toward the cliff.

S.FORM: hiza' korkoring ki 'aehoe' hiza 'okik raam ma homses si'intani' hiza sahae' ila ilahini ray ray 'ataS.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ hiz~ða ʔokik raam ma homs~θəs~θ s~θiʔintaniʔ hiz~ða s~θahæʔ ila ilahini raj raj ʔataʃ.
S.FORM: hiza' korkoring ki 'aehoe' hiza 'okik raam ma homses si'intani' hiza sahae' ila ilahini ray ray 'ataS.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ hiz~ða ʔokik raam ma homs~θəs~θ s~θiʔintaniʔ hiz~ða s~θahæʔ ila ilahini raj raj ʔataʃ.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩和狗不知道(他們在哪裡),很害怕;鹿停了下來,他門掉到懸崖下.

S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗不知道 ,很害怕;鹿停了下來,他門掉到懸崖下.

TRANSL.notes: The child and the dog did not know (where they were) and were frightened; the deer stopped and they fell off the cliff.

S.TRANSL: The child and the dog did not know and were frightened; the deer stopped and they fell off the cliff.

S.FORM: ra 'aehoe' ma isaa losalaz a malobaz ila sahae' ila 'oyae'.
S.PHON: ra ʔæhœʔ ma is~θaa los~θalaz~ð a maloβaz~ð ila s~θahæʔ ila ʔojæʔ.
S.FORM: ra 'aehoe' ma isaa losalaz a malobaz ila sahae' ila 'oyae'.
S.PHON: ra ʔæhœʔ ma is~θaa los~θalaz~ð a maloβaz~ð ila s~θahæʔ ila ʔojæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗也重重地一起掉下去.
The dog fell heavily and fell together with the child.

S.FORM: mti' kano' ila hini' hini' kaehoey ila nonak ray hiza' ray 'ataS babaw.
S.PHON: mtiʔ kanoʔ ila hiniʔ hiniʔ kæhœj ila nonak raj hiz~ðaʔ raj ʔataʃ βaβaw.
S.FORM: mti' kano' ila hini' hini' kaehoey ila nonak ray hiza' ray 'ataS babaw.
S.PHON: mtiʔ kanoʔ ila hiniʔ hiniʔ kæhœj ila nonak raj hiz~ðaʔ raj ʔataʃ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 在懸崖上有很多樹.
There were many trees above the cliff.

S.FORM: hini' wae'ae' 'ima paykosizaeh kita' ka ima sahae' ka mae'iyaeh ki 'ahoe'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ wæʔæʔ ʔima pajkos~θiz~ðæh kitaʔ ka ima s~θahæʔ ka mæʔijæh ki ʔahœʔ.
S.FORM: hini' wae'ae' 'ima paykosizaeh kita' ka ima sahae' ka mae'iyaeh ki 'ahoe'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ wæʔæʔ ʔima pajkos~θiz~ðæh kitaʔ ka ima s~θahæʔ ka mæʔijæh ki ʔahœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 當小孩和狗掉下去時,鹿在上面看.
The deer was on top of the cliff watching the boy and the dog fall down.

S.FORM: a maylal'oz ka ray wasal lasia sahae' hiza' ila.
S.PHON: a majlalʔoz~ð ka raj was~θal las~θia s~θahæʔ hiz~ðaʔ ila.
S.FORM: a maylal'oz ka ray wasal lasia sahae' hiza' ila.
S.PHON: a majlalʔoz~ð ka raj was~θal las~θia s~θahæʔ hiz~ðaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到下面.
They fell down below.

S.FORM: lalangoy ila ray ralom.
S.PHON: lalaŋoj ila raj ralom.
S.FORM: lalangoy ila ray ralom.
S.PHON: lalaŋoj ila raj ralom.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水裡游泳.
They swam in the water.

S.FORM: hiza' 'aehoe' nisia mari'in pahangal palalangoy ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ nis~θia mariʔin pahaŋal palalaŋoj ila.
S.FORM: hiza' 'aehoe' nisia mari'in pahangal palalangoy ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ nis~θia mariʔin pahaŋal palalaŋoj ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿著狗帶著他,使他游泳.
The boy took the dog and carried it up. He made it swim.

S.FORM: ni hayza 'aehae' ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: ni hajz~ða ʔæhæʔ ka kæhœj.
S.FORM: ni hayza 'aehae' ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: ni hajz~ða ʔæhæʔ ka kæhœj.
S.TRANSL: 有一根木頭.
There was a piece of wood.

S.FORM: rima' lasia ray langi kita' ka hini' ka kaehoey hini' a roro.
S.PHON: rimaʔ las~θia raj laŋi kitaʔ ka hiniʔ ka kæhœj hiniʔ a roro.
S.FORM: rima' lasia ray langi kita' ka hini' ka kaehoey hini' a roro.
S.PHON: rimaʔ las~θia raj laŋi kitaʔ ka hiniʔ ka kæhœj hiniʔ a roro.
S.TRANSL: 他們走去邊邊,看到樹裡有一個洞.
They went to the side and saw a hole in the piece of wood.

S.FORM: a rima' ila papama' ray kaehoey babaw n tabaai.
S.PHON: a rimaʔ ila papamaʔ raj kæhœj βaβaw n taβaai.
S.FORM: a rima' ila papama' ray kaehoey babaw n tabaai.
S.PHON: a rimaʔ ila papamaʔ raj kæhœj βaβaw n taβaai.
S.TRANSL: 他們走到枯木的上面.
They went over the top of the piece of dead wood.

S.FORM: na mwai' 'ima papama' ray atabai babaw ra yo kita' ila naehaen ka takem kamasal roSa' ila.
S.PHON: na mwaiʔ ʔima papamaʔ raj ataβai βaβaw ra jo kitaʔ ila næhæn ka takəm kamas~θal roʃaʔ ila.
S.FORM: na mwai' 'ima papama' ray atabai babaw ra yo kita' ila naehaen ka takem kamasal roSa' ila.
S.PHON: na mwaiʔ ʔima papamaʔ raj ataβai βaβaw ra jo kitaʔ ila næhæn ka takəm kamas~θal roʃaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬過枯木的上面,看到兩隻青蛙.
They climbed over the top of the dead wood and saw two frogs below.

S.FORM: hinap hini' 'aehae' korkoring ma 'iya rakep ka takem a 'ima ampowa' kita' ka 'ima.
S.PHON: hinap hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ ma ʔija rakəp ka takəm a ʔima ampowaʔ kitaʔ ka ʔima.
S.FORM: hinap hini' 'aehae' korkoring ma 'iya rakep ka takem a 'ima ampowa' kita' ka 'ima.
S.PHON: hinap hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ ma ʔija rakəp ka takəm a ʔima ampowaʔ kitaʔ ka ʔima.
S.TRANSL: 小孩想要抓青蛙.
The boy wanted to catch one frog.

S.FORM: raroton hiza' ka takem.
S.PHON: raroton hiz~ðaʔ ka takəm.
S.FORM: raroton hiza' ka takem.
S.PHON: raroton hiz~ðaʔ ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼青蛙聚集在哪裡呢?
Why did the frogs gather there.

S.FORM: kitkita' a ki 'aehoe' hiza' hini' 'aehoe' 'oe'oe ila ka.
S.PHON: kitkitaʔ a ki ʔæhœʔ hiz~ðaʔ hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ʔœʔœ ila ka.
S.FORM: kitkita' a ki 'aehoe' hiza' hini' 'aehoe' 'oe'oe ila ka.
S.PHON: kitkitaʔ a ki ʔæhœʔ hiz~ðaʔ hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ʔœʔœ ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 狗叫.
The dog barked.

S.FORM: korkoring hini' 'ima 'oe'oe ka hini' takem.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hiniʔ ʔima ʔœʔœ ka hiniʔ takəm.
S.FORM: korkoring hini' 'ima 'oe'oe ka hini' takem.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ hiniʔ ʔima ʔœʔœ ka hiniʔ takəm.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在叫青蛙.
The child called out to the frog.

S.FORM: 'ima komoSa hini' hayza naehaen nisia hiza' takem a 'aehae' rakepen ila.
S.PHON: ʔima komoʃa hiniʔ hajz~ða næhæn nis~θia hiz~ðaʔ takəm a ʔæhæʔ rakəpən ila.
S.FORM: 'ima komoSa hini' hayza naehaen nisia hiza' takem a 'aehae' rakepen ila.
S.PHON: ʔima komoʃa hiniʔ hajz~ða næhæn nis~θia hiz~ðaʔ takəm a ʔæhæʔ rakəpən ila.
S.TRANSL: 有他的 ... 他抓了一隻青蛙.
There was his ... he took one frog.

S.FORM: lasia hini' ma kakminitkita' koSa powa' iza 'oe'oe hiza'.
S.PHON: las~θia hiniʔ ma kakminitkitaʔ koʃa powaʔ iz~ða ʔœʔœ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.FORM: lasia hini' ma kakminitkita' koSa powa' iza 'oe'oe hiza'.
S.PHON: las~θia hiniʔ ma kakminitkitaʔ koʃa powaʔ iz~ða ʔœʔœ hiz~ðaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直看,為什麼一直叫?
They were watching, and asked why he kept calling.

S.FORM: sia 'ima bilis ka takem 'aehae'.
S.PHON: s~θia ʔima βilis~θ ka takəm ʔæhæʔ.
S.FORM: sia 'ima bilis ka takem 'aehae'.
S.PHON: s~θia ʔima βilis~θ ka takəm ʔæhæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿走一隻青蛙.
The child took one frog away.

S.FORM: lasia 'ima bazbazae' ila.
S.PHON: las~θia ʔima βaz~ðβaz~ðæʔ ila.
S.FORM: lasia 'ima bazbazae' ila.
S.PHON: las~θia ʔima βaz~ðβaz~ðæʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們在聽.
They were listening.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 沒有了.
It's finished.
